questionHtml: Sketch the graph of y=fx on the same set of axes as part (a)(i).
markschemeHtml:
concave up curve with minimum at approximately 1, 1       A1

asymptote of curve is isocline y=x-1       A1


Note: Only award FT from (b) if the above conditions are satisfied.


[2 marks]

meta.title: Sketch the graph of y=fx on the same set of axes as part (a)(i).
